subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath spoken that whereby all creation hath been enraptured, and through which they who have recognized His oneness have hastened unto the station of nearness and sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بما انجذب به الخلق و به سرع الموحدون الی مقام القرب و القدس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @presence of; reunion with God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
